revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:愛宕神社 (上尾市壱丁目)]]
{{Infobox religious building| ||name=Atago Shrine (Ichichōme, Ageo)|native_name={{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|en|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|qid=Q713021|lt=Atago Shrine|1=Atago Shrine (Kyoto)}} |religious_affiliation={{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} |image=File:Atago Jinja (Icchome, Ageo).JPG |location={{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Ageo|en|Ageo|qid=Q163888|lt=Ageo City|1=Ageo}}{{ill|Ichichōme|ja|壱丁目|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichichōme|1=Itchōme|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17988845}}344 |latitude_deg=35 |latitude_min=57 |latitude_sec=33.2 |longitude_deg=139 |longitude_min=34 |longitude_sec=01.0 |location map= |deity={{ill|Kagu-tsuchi|lt=Kagu-tsuchi|lt=Kagutsuchi|ja|軻遇突知命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagutsuchi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |type={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} |founding=Unknown |main_shrine= |alias=Ichichōme Atago Shrine |pilgrimage_site= |festival= |rituals= |prefecture={{ill|Ageo|qid=Q163888|1=Ageo}} |coordinates={{Coord|35.959222|N|139.566944|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Atago Shrine''' ({{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|en|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|qid=Q713021|lt=Atago Shrine|1=Atago Shrine (Kyoto)}}) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}} {{ill|Ageo|en|Ageo|qid=Q163888|lt=Ageo City|1=Ageo}}. == History == The founding date of Atago Shrine is unknown. However, because a cedar tree that existed until recently was estimated to be about 500 years old, the shrine is presumed to have been established around that time.<ref name="神社">{{Cite book|和書|author=埼玉県神社庁神社調査団 編|title=『埼玉の神社 北足立・児玉・南埼玉』|year=1998|publisher=埼玉県神社庁|pages=370–371|qq=}}</ref> In the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} period, the shrine was classified as a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, the guardian shrine (鎮守) of Ichichōme village was the {{ill|Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 氷川神社 (曖昧さ回避)|1=Hikawa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5760456}}, not Atago Shrine; however, because Atago Shrine was reputed to confer the benefit of curing measles, it was held in high esteem and became the village shrine. Meanwhile, Hikawa Shrine, which did not attain village shrine status, was eventually abolished, with its site later becoming the sports field of {{ill|Taisho Pharmaceutical|en|Taisho Pharmaceutical|qid=Q7676423|lt=Taishō Pharmaceutical|1=Taisho Pharmaceutical}}, and now occupied by {{ill|Ario Ageo|ja|アリオ上尾|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ario Ageo|1=Ario Ageo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q30922298}}.<ref name="神社"></ref><ref name="教育">[https://www.city.ageo.lg.jp/site/iinkai/064110110307.html 上尾の寺社22 愛宕神社（壱丁目）] – Ageo City Board of Education</ref> In the late {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} period, during a merger of shrines ({{ill|Shrine Consolidation Policy|en|Shrine Consolidation Policy|qid=Q11590700|lt=Shrine Consolidation Policy|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}), Atago Shrine was slated to be merged into {{ill|Koshin Jingū (Ageo Mukayama)|ja|向山神明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshin Jingū (Ageo Mukayama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502377|1=Mukōyama Shinmei Shrine}}, but due to opposition from the parishioners ({{ill|Ujiko|ja|氏子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ujiko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 氏神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Ujigami|qid=Q767655}}), it remained independent.<ref name="神社"></ref> In the {{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|qid=Q234510|lt=Heisei|1=Heisei era}} period, construction work on the {{ill|Ageo Road|ja|上尾道路|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ageo Road|1=Ageo road|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11358831}} significantly reduced the extent of the shrine precincts.<ref name="教育"></ref> == Cultural Properties == * The main shrine building of Atago Shrine is designated as a cultural property by Ageo City (designated March 31, {{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Showa|1=Shōwa era}} 61).<ref name="市">[https://www.city.ageo.lg.jp/site/iinkai/064110111610.html 上尾の指定・登録文化財一覧] – Ageo City</ref> == Transportation == * Approximately a 3-minute walk from the Atago Shrine-mae bus stop on local bus services. == Footnotes == {{Reflist|qq=}} == References == * 埼玉県神社庁神社調査団 編『埼玉の神社 北足立・児玉・南埼玉』, 埼玉県神社庁, 1998 {{Pref-stub|pref={{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}|qq=}} {{shinto-stub|qq=}}
{{Atago Faith|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|愛宕神社 (上尾市壱丁目)|version=102437285|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:愛宕神社 (上尾市壱丁目)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q128866607}} [[Category:上尾市の建築物]] [[Category:上尾市の歴史]] [[Category:Son-sha in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Atago shrines]] [[Category:incorrect template category applied]]
